title: USGS Groundwater Science
description: A USGS source card about aquifers, wells, groundwater flow, and water availability.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS groundwater resources explain aquifers, wells, recharge, pumping, water tables, and the connection between groundwater and surface water.
Use this source for systems thinking, diagrams, local water questions, and evaluating how communities balance water needs with environmental limits.
USGS education and science materials are generally public domain, while linked media and partner content should be checked for item-level rights.
